name: Bunting
description: Strings of party pennants swaying between the rows — every redraw recolors the flags and lets them flutter to a new hang.

code.style: --flag: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( border-top: calc(18px / @Y) solid rgba(80, 70, 60, 0.5); box-sizing: border-box; @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 16%; top: 0; width: 68%; height: @rand(54%, 74%); background: var(--flag); clip-path: polygon(6% 0%, 94% 0%, 50% 100%); transform-origin: 50% 0%; transform: rotate(@rand(-10deg, 10deg)); transition: ease 700ms; } } transition: ease 700ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
